scripts.check: bun run --cwd plugin check && bun run lua:check
scripts.test: bun run --cwd plugin test && lua hammerspoon/tests/run.lua && lua hammerspoon/tests/server-startup.test.lua
scripts.lua:check: lua -e "for _, path in ipairs({...}) do assert(loadfile(path), path); end" hammerspoon/streamdeck/*.lua hammerspoon/tests/*.lua hammerspoon/examples/*.lua
scripts.validate: bun run build && bunx --no-install streamdeck validate plugin/com.brettinternet.hammerspoon.sdPlugin
scripts.pack: bun run build && bunx --no-install streamdeck pack --force plugin/com.brettinternet.hammerspoon.sdPlugin
